name: Nordigen (GoCardless)
description: MCP server for GoCardless Bank Account Data API (formerly Nordigen) - PSD2-compliant open banking for EU/UK. Connect bank accounts, fetch transactions, balances, and account details from 2500+ banks.

tools.name: create_token
tools.description: Obtain a new access token and refresh token using your secret_id and secret_key. Access tokens expire after 24 hours.

secret_id.description: Your GoCardless/Nordigen secret_id (will use credential if not provided)

secret_key.description: Your GoCardless/Nordigen secret_key (will use credential if not provided)

tools.name: refresh_token
tools.description: Refresh an expired access token using a refresh token. Refresh tokens expire after 30 days.

refresh.description: The refresh token from create-token response

tools.name: list_institutions
tools.description: List all available banking institutions for a given country. Returns institution IDs, names, logos, BICs, and supported features.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. GB, DE, FR, NL, ES, IT, SE, NO, DK, FI, PL, PT, BE, AT, IE, LT, LV, EE)

payments_enabled.description: Filter institutions that support payment initiation

tools.name: get_institution
tools.description: Get details about a specific banking institution including supported features, transaction history days, and countries

tools.name: create_agreement
tools.description: Create an end user agreement (EUA) specifying data access scope and duration for a bank connection. Controls what data is shared and for how long (max 90 days).

institution_id.description: Institution ID to create agreement for

max_historical_days.description: Maximum number of days of transaction history (default 90, max depends on institution)

access_valid_for_days.description: Number of days the access is valid (default 90, max 180)

access_scope.description: Data access scope: balances, details, transactions

tools.name: get_agreement
tools.description: Get details of a specific end user agreement by ID

tools.name: list_agreements
tools.description: List all end user agreements with pagination

tools.name: delete_agreement
tools.description: Delete an end user agreement by ID, revoking consent

agreement_id.description: The UUID of the agreement to delete

tools.name: accept_agreement
tools.description: Accept an end user agreement (for use with SSN verification flow). Sets the agreement status to accepted.

agreement_id.description: The UUID of the agreement to accept

user_agent.description: User agent string of the end user's browser

ip_address.description: IP address of the end user

tools.name: create_requisition
tools.description: Create a requisition (bank connection link) that the end user will use to authorize access to their bank account. Returns a link URL to redirect the user to.

redirect.description: URL to redirect the user to after bank authorization

agreement.description: Optional end user agreement UUID. If not provided, default agreement is created.

reference.description: Your internal reference for this requisition (unique per requisition)

user_language.description: Language for the bank authorization flow (EN, DE, FR, ES, etc.)

ssn.description: Social Security Number (required by some Nordic banks)

account_selection.description: Enable account selection step in the authorization flow

redirect_immediate.description: Redirect immediately after authorization without confirmation screen

tools.name: get_requisition
tools.description: Get the status and linked account IDs of a requisition. Status can be: CR (created), LN (linked), EX (expired), RJ (rejected), SA (suspended), GA (granting access).

tools.name: list_requisitions
tools.description: List all requisitions with their statuses and linked accounts

tools.name: delete_requisition
tools.description: Delete a requisition and revoke access to all linked accounts

requisition_id.description: The UUID of the requisition to delete

tools.name: get_account_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for a linked bank account including IBAN, institution, owner name, status, and creation date

account_id.description: The UUID of the linked bank account (from requisition.accounts)

tools.name: get_account_details
tools.description: Get detailed account information including IBAN, currency, account type (CACC, SVGS, etc.), product name, and owner details

account_id.description: The UUID of the linked bank account

tools.name: get_account_balances
tools.description: Get current balances for a linked bank account. Returns closingBooked, expected, interimAvailable, and other balance types depending on the bank.

account_id.description: The UUID of the linked bank account

tools.name: get_account_transactions
tools.description: Get transactions for a linked bank account. Returns booked and pending transactions with remittance info, creditor/debtor details, and amounts.

account_id.description: The UUID of the linked bank account

date_from.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 90 days ago.

tools.name: get_premium_transactions
tools.description: Get enriched/categorized transactions with merchant info, categories, and clean descriptions (premium feature)

account_id.description: The UUID of the linked bank account

tools.name: initiate_payment
tools.description: Initiate a SEPA or domestic payment from a bank account (requires payment_initiation support from the institution)

institution_id.description: Institution ID that supports payment initiation

redirect.description: URL to redirect user after payment authorization

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get the status and details of a payment initiation
